calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction; Resignation Of Trustee; Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Levin for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

The Court noted this petition is missing a verification. Ms. Levin stated that she sent the verification to her client last week, and anticipated it will be back in her hands today, and would be filed as soon as possible. Ms. Levin also stated that Wells Fargo is not resisting resignation as Trustee. In addition, Ms. Levin reported that the Successor Trustee had requested specific language in the order of appointment which did not preclude the successor Trustee from bringing action against the predecessor Trustee, but relieved them from an obligation to bring such an action. She accordingly prepared a revised order clarifying this point which she submitted in open court. The Petition for Instruction, etc. is Taken Under Submission, pending the filing of the verification. The Court noted that if the verification is not filed within 1 week, it may put the matter back on calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Craig Blackstone. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Instruction; Resignation Of Trustee; Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
